title: Hell Froze Over
description: Turn the nether into a frozen winter wonderland.
body:
A cool alternative to the typical hot, oppressive nether.


Works well with **Frozen**:

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/frozen-znygames](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/frozen-znygames)


Compatible with **Better Frost Walker**:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/better-frost-walker](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-frost-walker)


Feedback and Suggestions :

yoshiq222@gmail.com
